svg.title: Rust for Data Engineering: 31-Course Coursera Specialization
svg.desc: All 31 courses of the Rust for Data Engineering Coursera specialization shown as track-color-coded chips on a dark hex-pattern background. Orange chips are foundations and systems; blue chips are data and database tracks; purple chips are AI; green chips are methodology and ethics. A central "31" badge anchors the title block. Status footer reports 21 Launched and 10 Draft.
svg.text: A 31-Course Coursera Specialization · Fast, Reliable & Correct Data Pipelines
